gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Milestones" tile from the home page
Then the user should land on the Milestones page
And the user should see a calendar on top of the page
And the user should see a Search box right next to the calendar
And the user should see a list of scheduled games for the selected date
And each game in the list should display the following information:
Note: Values in the *Values* columns are examples.
|*Field*|*Value*|
|Game Name|CIN @ PIT|
|Game PK|778832|
|Venue|PNC Park|
|Game Date|Fri, Aug 8, 8:40 PM EDT|
|Status|SCHEDULED|
And each game entry should also have a "Edit Milestones" button on the right of the game card
